name: Nikita Khrushchev
description: leader of the Soviet Union from 1953 to 1964
abstract: Nikita Sergeyevich Khrushchev (15 April [O.S. 3 April] 1894 – 11 September 1971) was the First Secretary of the Communist Party of the Soviet Union from 1953 to 1964 and the Chairman of the Council of Ministers from 1958 to 1964.

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Hendricks
about_quotes.evidence: It’s like when Eisenhower was talking to Nikita Khrushchev... I always read the Times for that reason.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Hendricks interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000 [interview 2 of 2]
